name: openviking-mcphub
description: Long-term semantic memory for Codex, powered by OpenViking, with MCPHub-managed MCP access.

interface.shortDescription: Codex memory plugin that reuses session-provided OpenViking MCP
interface.longDescription: Hooks Codex lifecycle events into OpenViking for recall and capture. For direct model access to OpenViking MCP tools, use the current runtime session's OpenViking MCP when it is already exposed through MCPHub.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenViking memory when previous context or long-term memory could help. If direct MCP tools are needed, prefer the current session's OpenViking MCP from MCPHub.
